name: Serial port access enabled on VM instance
description: The VM instance has serial port access enabled via instance metadata (serial-port-enable=true). The serial console provides unauthenticated interactive access to the VM and does not support OS Login — anyone with the compute.instances.getSerialPortOutput permission can interact with the console. This is a known privilege escalation vector.
remediation: Disable serial port access on all instances: gcloud compute instances add-metadata INSTANCE --metadata serial-port-enable=false. Enforce at scale via Organization Policy constraint constraints/compute.disableSerialPortAccess. Use Cloud Logging serial output instead for debugging.
